Class DreamSlash_Skill

java.lang.Object
Skill
DreamSlash_Skill
public class DreamSlash_Skill extends Skill
Class file for the DreamSlash_Skill class, this is a subclass of the abstract Skill class

Dream Slash restores the user's HP by a percentage of damage dealt to the enemy while also increasing their speed by a set amount of turns

The HP restored, speed bonus, and duration of the speed bonus are arbitrarily set upon initialization

The skill becomes available to use after the user has dealt a set amount of damage to the enemy

See Also:

    void
    activateSkill(Character character, Character target)
    Concrete implementation of the activateSkill method This method only becomes available to use when the skill's condition has been met
    void
    checkSkillConditionCounter(Character character, Character target)
    Concrete implementation of the checkSkillConditionCounter method The skill activates when a user has dealt an x amount of total damage to the enemy
    void

    Concrete implementation of the createActiveSkillResult Description method Generates the text to be displayed when the user activates the skill
    void
    deactivateSkill(Character character, Character target)
    Concrete implementation of the deactivateSkill method The condition count is reset upon skill activation, however the speed increase will remain for the amount of turns set within the constructor

  • Constructor Details

    • DreamSlash_Skill

      public DreamSlash_Skill(double attackMultiplier, double lifeStealMultiplier, int speedAdditive, int baseTurnsForSkill, int requiredConditionCounter)
      Constructor for the Dream Slash Skill
      Parameters:
      attackMultiplier - value to multiply attack by when skill is used, all values are assumed valid
      lifeStealMultiplier - percentage of damage dealt to be converted into HP, all values are assumed valid
      speedAdditive - value to increase speed by, all values are assumed valid
      baseTurnsForSkill - amount of turns speed increase will remain active, all values are assumed valid
      requiredConditionCounter - amount of damage that needs to be dealt in order for the skill to become available

  • Method Details

    • createActiveSkillResultDescription

      public void createActiveSkillResultDescription(Character character, Character target)
      Concrete implementation of the createActiveSkillResult Description method Generates the text to be displayed when the user activates the skill
      Specified by:
      createActiveSkillResultDescription in class Skill
      Parameters:
      character - character object that has the skill equipped
      target - character object that is the target of the skill

      Parameters:
      character - Character object that has the skill equipped
      target - Character object that is the target of the skill

      public void activateSkill(Character character, Character target)

      activateSkill in class Skill
      Parameters:

      target - Character object that is the target of the skill

    • deactivateSkill

      public void deactivateSkill(Character character, Character target)
      Concrete implementation of the deactivateSkill method The condition count is reset upon skill activation, however the speed increase will remain for the amount of turns set within the constructor
      Specified by:
      deactivateSkill in class Skill
      Parameters:
      character - Character object using the skill
      target - Character object that is the target of the skill
